[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111111 6
1 00101001 3
2 00111011 5
3 11011111 7
4 00110011 4
5 01010000 2
6 00010000 1
7 00111011 5

01 10 11111111 a
12 21 11110111 7
23 32 11111011 7
34 43 00111111 6 match 0
45 54 00111111 6 match 0
56 65 00111011 5 match 2 7
67 76 11111111 a
70 07 11111111 a

02 20 11111011 7
13 31 01111111 7
24 42 11111111 a
35 53 00111011 5 match 2 7
46 64 00111111 6 match 0
57 75 11111111 a
60 06 10111011 6
71 17 11111111 a

03 30 10111011 6
14 41 01111111 7
25 52 11111001 6
36 63 00111011 5 match 2 7
47 74 11111111 a
50 05 10111011 6
61 16 01111111 7
72 27 11011111 7 match 3

04 40 10111111 7
15 51 01111111 7
26 62 11111011 7
37 73 11111111 a
